arts.ttl: Barcelona not expected to risk midfield star against Las Palmas
arts.sum: Barcelona are back in La Liga action against Las Palmas this weekend but Dani Olmo is set to miss out. La Blaugrana have been boosted by some positive fitness news in the lead up to the match with attacking duo Ferran Torres and Lamine Yamal both passed fit. The latter is expected to be brought […] The post Barcelona not expected to risk midfield star against Las Palmas appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Ronaldinho scores brilliant free-kick for Barca in legends El Clasico
arts.sum: Brazilian footballing legend Ronaldinho scores a trademark free-kick for Barcelona against Real Madrid in a legends El Clasico match in Doha, Qatar.

arts.ttl: Possible Barcelona lineup for LaLiga clash against Las Palmas as Lamine Yamal returns
arts.sum: The good news for the German coach is that he can count on the return of two key players as Lamine Yamal and Ferran Torres have both been given the green light by the FC Barcelona medical team with three league games ahead for Barça in the next seven days. Iñaki Peña will start in goal again with Koundé and Balde on the wings, Cubarsí and Iñigo will marshall the centre of defence with Pedri, Fermin and Gavi in central roles.

arts.ttl: Out-of-favour Barcelona star confims he is ready to take a starting role
arts.sum: Barcelona star Ansu Fati on Friday confirmed his readiness to seek out a role in the first-choice XI at the club. Wide-man Ansu is for his part of course currently…

arts.ttl: ‘A great honour’ – Real Madrid send anniversary message to Barcelona
arts.sum: Real Madrid have on Friday moved to reveal their appreciation for the club’s arch rivals, Barcelona. This, of course, comes on a special day for all associated with the Blaugrana.…

arts.ttl: Joan Laporta names ‘the most decisive player in Barcelona’s history’
arts.sum: Barcelona president Joan Laporta made use of the club’s anniversary ceremony to lavish praise on the club’s greatest-ever player – Lionel Messi. A lavish gala is currently taking place in…

arts.ttl: Christensen responds to talk he’s on his way out of Barca
arts.sum: “I can only speak from the conversations I’ve had with the club and so far they’ve just said to make sure I’m ready and they’re looking forward to me being back.” Christensen was then asked if he would be staying at Barca and responded: “Yes, of course.”

arts.ttl: Talented Spanish defender confirms Barcelona move was close this summer
arts.sum: Almeria right-back Marc Pubill has always been highly rated in Spain since his professional debut with Levante, and it looked like he would be making the jump to European football this summer. The 21-year-old was first on the verge of a move to Atalanta, before he was linked to Barcelona. arts.ttl: Watch: Pedri, Raphinha and Barcelona stars arrive at anniversary gala
arts.sum: Footage of a whole host of leading members of Hansi Flick’s Barcelona squad arriving at the club’s anniversary gala has come to the fore online. Today of course marks a…

arts.ttl: Xavi & Neymar send anniversary messages to Barcelona
arts.sum: Former Barcelona stars Xavi Hernández and Neymar Jr. have on Friday taken to social media, to send messages of affection to the Blaugrana. This, of course, comes on a special…
